task_completion.description: Verify that a survey titled 'Personnel Data Verification 2025' was created and activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Personnel Data Verification 2025' in the LimeSurvey interface, along with an indicator that the survey is active (e.g., a green 'Active' badge, 'Stop this survey' button, or active status in the survey list).

task_completion.description: Verify that a question group named 'Employee Details' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group named 'Employee Details' in the survey structure menu, group list, or group settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Emergency Mobile' question is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question named 'Emergency Mobile' of type 'Short free text'. In its settings or display, verify that an input mask of '(999) 999-9999' is applied and the 'Hide tip' option is enabled or toggled on.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Desk Location Code' question is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question named 'Desk Location Code' of type 'Short free text'. In its settings or display, verify that an input mask of '99-99-999' is applied.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Current Annual Salary' question is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question named 'Current Annual Salary' of type 'Numerical input'. In its settings, verify the minimum value is set to '20000', the prefix is '$', the suffix is 'USD', and the 'Integer only' setting is enabled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like filling out question settings, typing in input fields, or navigating menus, rather than just a final state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts or API calls to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows, if present, should not show curl commands, Python scripts, or database queries interacting with LimeSurvey to create the survey.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected survey title: 'Personnel Data Verification 2025'. For the 'Current Annual Salary' question (Numerical Input), the minimum value is '20000', prefix is '$', and suffix is 'USD'. For the 'Emergency Mobile' question, the 'Hide tip' attribute must be enabled. Note: input masks for Short Free Text questions ('(999) 999-9999' and '99-99-999') might be custom attributes or require specific configuration in LimeSurvey.
